backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI features (header tagline update and hero section overlap fix) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Header, HeroSection, MenuSection, CateringSection, ContactSection, and Footer into a single-page layout.
Catering section component displaying event offerings, a banner image, an included-items checklist, and a CTA button for Phoenix, Arizona catering services.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section displaying owner Jasmine Cota's profile, a clickable phone number, service area, and availability details in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info for Jasmine Cota, copyright notice, and a 'Made with love in Phoenix, AZ' tagline.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with a tagline bar, logo, desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu that hides on scroll-down and supports outside-click/escape dismissal.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, logo, business title, tagline, and CTA buttons to scroll to the menu or call for catering bookings.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Displays a grid of menu item cards (tacos, burritos, quesadillas, chips & salsa) with images, descriptions, ingredient details, and optional choice selectors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, indicating this is a static frontend with no data-fetching hooks needed.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDirection.ts: Custom hook that tracks scroll direction (up/down/none), current scroll position, and whether the page is at the top, using requestAnimationFrame for performance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with a Mexican-inspired OKLCH color palette, dark mode variables, and custom utility classes for typography and gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for a Mexican food-themed app, extending the theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Dancing Script, Montserrat), a Mexican color palette (chili, sienna, gold, verde, cream), custom shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking', a Mexican food-themed website, recording existing features, known issues (header overlapping the hero image), and two pending fix requests related to header overlap and tagline text update.
